a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|0: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|1: You realise you've been standing in the aisle. For how long?
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|2: The train sways on, and you don't know how long you've been staring.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0: You look at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2: The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:coach8|framing|intro|2: The conductor clipped your ticket and nodded up the train. Coach 8, that way.
a:coach8|framing|intro|3: That was a while ago. You're still walking, and every carriage looks the same.
a:coach8|framing|intro|5: While a carriage is exactly as you remember it, keep walking forward.
a:coach8|framing|intro|6: If anything has changed, turn around. This one is folding you back.
a:coach8|framing|intro|8: Eight coaches, and you can finally sit down.
a:coach8|framing|intro|9: Lose your certainty, and the train sets you back where you started.
a:coach8|framing|win|0: You slide open one more door, and the seat numbers read 8.
a:coach8|framing|win|1: Coach 8. Your seat, empty and waiting, beside a black window.
a:coach8|framing|win|2: You sink into it at last. The train rushes on through the night.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|0: The connecting door at the coach's end is shut, its glass dark.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|1: The powered door to the next carriage stands closed, as usual.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|2: The end door is closed, the vestibule beyond it dim.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|0: The glass in the connecting door is fogged, a hand-print on it.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|1: Something smears the window of the end door from the far side.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|2: The connecting door's glass is cracked in a spider's web.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|0: A red light burns on the connecting door: LOCKED.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|1: The end door shows a locked indicator that was green before.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|2: The door to the next coach reads DO NOT ENTER.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|0: The connecting door is stuck open, cold air rushing through.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|1: The powered door won't close; the vestibule roars beyond.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|2: The end door gapes open onto the shaking vestibule.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|0: The cabin lights are dimmed for night, a soft amber wash.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|1: Low night-lighting glows along the luggage racks, as always.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|2: The overhead lights are down to their amber night setting.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|3: The coach is lit the same soft gold as the last.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|0: The lights are up full, harsh and white, not the night setting.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|1: This coach is lit far brighter than the last.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|2: The soft amber is gone; everything glares white.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0: The cabin lights flutter with the motion of the train, then hold.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1: One strip of lighting stutters overhead.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2: The amber light trips off, then on again.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|0: The cabin is dark but for the emergency floor strips.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|1: The lights are out here; only the aisle markers glow.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|2: Darkness, save a thin line of light along the floor.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|0: A single suitcase sits in the luggage rack by the door.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|1: The overhead racks hold the usual scattering of bags.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|2: One hard-shell case rides the luggage rack, as before.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|0: The luggage rack is empty now.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|1: The suitcase by the door is gone.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|2: There are no bags in the racks this time.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|0: The luggage rack is crammed full, far more bags than before.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|1: Cases are stacked nearly to the ceiling now.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|2: The racks overflow with luggage that wasn't there.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|0: The suitcase in the rack lies open, empty.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|1: A case has spilled open across the luggage rack.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|2: The hard-shell case gapes open, its contents gone.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|0: A lone passenger sleeps against the far window, coat over their face.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|1: One passenger dozes midway down the coach, head tipped back.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|2: The same sleeping figure slumps in a window seat, as before.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|0: The passenger is awake now, sitting upright, very still.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|1: The sleeper's eyes are open, fixed on the aisle.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|2: The passenger no longer sleeps. They watch you pass.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|0: The seat where the passenger slept is empty now.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|1: No one is sleeping in the coach this time.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|2: The dozing passenger is gone; only a folded coat remains.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|0: The sleeping passenger has moved to a seat nearer the aisle.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|1: The dozing figure is closer than before, on your side now.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|2: The passenger sleeps in a different seat than a moment ago.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|0: The sleeping passenger murmurs, without waking: 'again?'
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|1: From under the coat, a muffled voice: 'you were just here.'
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|2: The dozing figure says the name of your stop, though you told no one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|0: Two passengers sleep here now, where there was one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|1: There are a pair of coats-over-faces this time, not one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|2: A second sleeping figure has joined the first.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|0: The seat decals read 8A, 8B, 8C down the row.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|1: Little brass numbers mark the seats: row 8, as always.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|2: The coach-number panel by the door glows COACH 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|0: The seat decals read 8X, 8Y, 8Z, letters that don't belong.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|1: The row is numbered in an alphabet you don't recognise.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|2: The seat labels are just symbols now, not numbers.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|0: The seat numbers have been prised off; bare screw-holes remain.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|1: The coach-number panel by the door is dark and blank.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|2: There are no numbers on the seats at all this time.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|0: The seat decals read row 7 now, not 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|2: The brass numbers say row 6; you were sure it was 8.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|0: The train feels exactly as long as it always has.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|1: You carry the same tired patience up the aisle, coach after coach.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|2: Everything feels as ordinary as a night train should.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|0: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already arrived.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|1: A strange contentment settles over you that has no business being here.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|2: You feel no urgency at all, and that itself feels wrong.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|0: For a moment you can't remember how many coaches you've walked.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|1: You lose count of the carriages behind you, and it frightens you.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|2: You can't recall boarding this train at all.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|0: You feel watched, though every passenger is asleep.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|1: The certainty that someone is behind you won't leave.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|2: Your neck prickles; you are sure you are not alone in the way you were.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|0: The rails beat their steady rhythm beneath the floor.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|1: The train hums along, wheels ticking over the joints.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|2: That familiar sway and clatter of a train at speed.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|0: A chime sounds, then a muffled announcement you can't make out.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|1: The PA crackles with a voice, then cuts off.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|0: The rails beat faster than they should, a rising whine.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|1: The train is accelerating, the clatter climbing in pitch.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|2: Everything rattles harder; you're speeding up.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|0: The wheels have gone silent. You feel no motion at all.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|1: The train sound has stopped. Dead still.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|2: No clatter, no sway. The train might not be moving.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|0: The rhythm of the rails is slowing. Are you stopping?
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|1: The clatter drags, as if the train is losing speed.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|2: The beat beneath the floor stretches longer between ticks.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|0: A fold-down table by the aisle holds a half-finished coffee.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|1: The tray table is down, a paper cup cooling on it, as always.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|2: On the table, someone's coffee, still steaming faintly.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|0: The coffee on the table has gone cold, a skin across the top.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|1: The cup is stone cold now, long abandoned.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|2: The coffee sits cold and still, no steam at all.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|0: The table is bare; the coffee cup is gone.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|1: The tray table holds nothing now.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|2: There's no cup on the table this time.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|0: The table is crowded with cups now, not one but many.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|1: Several coffees crowd the tray table where there was one.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|2: The table is cluttered with more cups than anyone could drink.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|0: The coffee has spilled, a dark stain spreading over the table.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|1: The cup is tipped, coffee running off the table's edge.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|2: Coffee pools across the table, dripping to the floor.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|0: Beyond the window, black countryside and your own faint reflection.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|1: The window shows only night and the ghost of the cabin.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|2: Dark fields streak past the window, far-off lights scattered.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|0: The window is bright with daylight. It was night a moment ago.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|1: Outside the glass it is suddenly, impossibly, day.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|2: Sunlight fills the window where there was only dark.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|0: Your reflection in the glass is a half-second behind you.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|1: The reflection in the window doesn't quite match the cabin.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|2: Someone stands in the window's reflection who isn't in the coach.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|0: The window shows a lit platform sliding by, a station, unannounced.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|1: Outside, a station platform passes, empty and bright.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|2: A station slides past the glass; you never felt the train slow.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|0: The window is pure black, a tunnel, roaring, with no end to it.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|1: You're in a tunnel now; the glass shows only rushing dark.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|2: Nothing but black tunnel wall streams past the window.
a:coach8|tagline: The conductor said coach 8. The train never seems to reach it.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|0: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|1: You realise you've been standing still. For how long?
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|2: Time slips. You were staring, and you don't know for how long.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|: You glance at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|2: You stayed too late. The lobby doors are locked, the lights half-out.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|3: A handwritten sign hangs over them: FIRE EXIT, USE CORRIDOR.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|5: While a stretch of corridor is exactly as you remember it, walk on.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|6: If anything has changed, the way has doubled back. Return the way you came.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|8: The eighth fire door leads out.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|9: Lose track of what you've seen, and the building returns you to the start.
a:hallway-eight|framing|win|0: The eighth fire door gives under your hands.
a:hallway-eight|framing|win|1: Cold air. A stairwell down to the street. The city, still there.
a:hallway-eight|framing|win|2: You were beginning to think the corridor had no end.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|0: A small CCTV camera in the corner points down the corridor.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|1: The security camera watches the far end, angled away from you.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|2: Up in the corner, the camera faces ahead, as always.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|0: The CCTV camera has turned. It points directly at you.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|1: The security camera is angled down at you now.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|2: The camera in the corner faces you, its lens level with your eyes.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|0: A red light blinks on the camera. It never used to blink.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|1: The camera's recording light glows red for the first time.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|2: The little LED on the camera pulses red.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|0: A grey maintenance door sits shut in the left wall.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|1: The service door on your left is closed, as usual.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|2: There's the maintenance door, shut tight.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|0: The maintenance door stands slightly ajar. Darkness inside.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|1: The service door is open a crack, though you never saw it open.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|2: The grey door is ajar; a thin black gap where it should be flush.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|0: There is no maintenance door in the left wall. Just smooth wall.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|1: The service door is missing entirely.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|2: The left wall is unbroken, no door at all.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|0: Far down the corridor, a man in a grey suit walks away from you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|1: A suited figure moves ahead in the distance, back turned.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|2: The man in grey is up ahead, as always, walking on.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|3: Down the hall, a man in a suit recedes towards the vanishing point.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|0: The man in the grey suit is much closer than he should be.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|1: The suited figure has stopped halfway, closer than before.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|2: The man in grey is only a few paces ahead now, still turned away.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|0: The man in the grey suit has stopped. He is facing you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|1: Down the hall, the suited figure stands still, looking your way.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|2: The man in grey is not walking. He is watching you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|0: The corridor ahead is empty. No one is walking it.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|1: There is no figure ahead this time.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|2: The man in the grey suit is nowhere to be seen.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|0: The man in grey has turned and raised a hand, as if he knows you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|1: The suited figure faces you and beckons, slow and deliberate.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|2: The man mouths something down the corridor. It might be 'again.'
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|0: The grey floor tiles stretch away, dry and dull.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|1: Underfoot, the usual scuffed grey tiles.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|2: The tiled floor is dry, reflecting nothing.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|0: A crack runs across the floor tiles that wasn't there before.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|1: One of the floor tiles is split down the middle.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|2: The tiling is fractured in a jagged line ahead.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|0: The tiles ahead shine with a wet, dark sheen.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|1: The floor is wet, though you saw no one clean it.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|2: A slick of water spreads across the tiles.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|0: The fluorescent lights hum softly overhead.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|1: The ceiling lights give off a steady, even glow.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|2: Overhead, the fluorescents buzz at their usual pitch.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|3: The lighting is flat and unremarkable, the way it always is.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|0: The corridor seems a shade darker than you remember.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|1: The lights are dimmer here, as if half of them gave up.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|2: A grey dimness has settled over everything.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|0: One of the fluorescent tubes stutters, then holds.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|1: The lights flicker, once, twice, before settling.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|2: There's a faint strobe to the ceiling lights that wasn't there before.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|0: The light has a warm, yellowish cast to it.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|1: The fluorescents glow oddly amber, almost like sunset.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|2: The usual cold white has turned faintly golden.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|0: A faded travel poster clings to the wall, a beach, a blue sky.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|1: The old poster of a sunny coastline is still taped to the wall.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|2: On the wall, that washed-out advertisement for somewhere warm.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|3: The travel poster hangs at its usual slight tilt.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|0: The wall is bare. A pale rectangle marks where a poster used to be.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|1: The travel poster is gone; only the tape remains.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|2: Nothing hangs on the wall now.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|0: The poster shows snow-capped mountains, not a beach.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|1: The coastline poster is now a photograph of grey mountains.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|2: The advertisement pictures a cold summit under heavy cloud.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|0: The travel poster hangs upside down.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|1: The beach on the poster is inverted, sky at the bottom.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|2: Someone has flipped the poster; it hangs the wrong way up.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|0: The corridor feels exactly as long as it always has.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|1: You carry the same low dread you've had since the lobby.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|2: Everything feels ordinary, in the way this place is ever ordinary.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|0: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already escaped.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|1: A strange relief washes over you that has no business being here.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|2: You feel no fear at all, and that itself feels wrong.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|0: For a moment you can't remember how many doors you've passed.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|1: You lose your count of the corridors, and it unsettles you.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|2: You can't recall why you're down here at all.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|0: The corridor feels longer this time, though you can't say why.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|1: The far end seems further off than it should be.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|2: The walls feel as if they've stretched since the last stretch.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|0: The illuminated {SIGN} sign glows at the far end.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|1: Ahead, the {SIGN} sign hangs above the corridor.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|2: The green {SIGN} sign points the way, as it should.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|3: You can make out the {SIGN} sign in the distance.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|0: The exit sign is dark. No light behind the letters.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|1: The exit sign has gone out.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|2: Where the exit sign should glow, there is only a dead panel.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|0: The sign reads EXIT 3. There was never a number on it.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|1: A number has appeared on the sign: EXIT 3.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|2: The exit sign now carries a numeral you don't remember: 3.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:reversed|0: The exit sign points the wrong way, EXIT ←.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:reversed|1: The arrow on the exit sign now points back the way you came: ←.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|0: Somewhere, ventilation exhales a low, constant breath.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|1: The air handling hums in the walls, steady as ever.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|2: You hear the familiar drone of distant ventilation.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|0: A slow drip taps somewhere out of sight.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|1: Water is dripping, you can't place where.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|2: Tick. Tick. Something is dripping nearby.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|0: Footsteps echo somewhere behind you, then stop.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|1: You hear footsteps that don't match your own.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|2: For a moment there are two sets of footsteps.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|0: The ventilation has stopped. The silence presses on your ears.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|1: It is completely quiet. Too quiet.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|2: You notice the hum is gone. The stillness feels wrong.
a:hallway-eight|tagline: Locked in after hours. Follow the corridor to the fire exit.
a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|0: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|1: You realise you've been standing on the landing. For how long?
a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|2: Time slips. You were staring down the shaft, and you don't know for how long.
a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0: You check the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2: The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|2: You press the call button. Nothing. A notice is taped across the doors:
a:stairway8|framing|intro|3: LIFT OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|5: While a landing is exactly as you remember it, keep descending.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|6: If anything has changed, the stairwell has turned you around. Climb back up.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|8: The ground floor is the way out.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|9: Lose count of the landings, and you'll be back at the top.
a:stairway8|framing|win|0: The last flight opens onto the lobby.
a:stairway8|framing|win|1: Daylight through the doors. The street. The lift behind you, still dead.
a:stairway8|framing|win|2: Eight floors down, and your memory held every landing.
a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|0: The fire door to the floor is shut, its wired glass dark.
a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|1: The heavy grey fire door stands closed on the landing.
a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|2: The door onto the floor is closed, the way it should be.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|0: The fire door hangs slightly ajar. A black gap, no light.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|1: The heavy door is open a crack; it never is.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|2: The fire door isn't quite shut this time.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|0: The fire door has no handle now.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|1: Where the door handle was, only bare holes.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|2: The handle is missing from the fire door.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|0: The fire door is propped wide open onto a dark floor.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|1: Someone has wedged the fire door open.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|2: The door stands fully open, held by nothing you can see.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|0: The wired-glass window in the door has gone black, covered.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|1: The little window in the fire door is blocked from the other side.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|2: Something presses against the glass in the door.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|0: A fire extinguisher hangs on its bracket beside the door.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|1: The red extinguisher is in its place on the wall.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|2: The landing's fire extinguisher sits on its hook.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|0: The extinguisher lies on the floor, on its side.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|1: The fire extinguisher has been set down on the landing.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|2: The extinguisher stands loose against the wall, off its hook.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|0: The extinguisher's pressure gauge reads in the red.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|1: The needle on the extinguisher sits deep in the red.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|2: The extinguisher's gauge has dropped to empty.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gone|1: The fire extinguisher is gone; only the bracket remains.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gone|2: No extinguisher on the wall this time.
a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|0: Far below, someone else winds down the stairwell, always a flight or two ahead.
a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|1: A figure descends the shaft ahead of you, keeping the same distance.
a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|2: Someone is on the stairs below, going down at your pace, never closer.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|0: The figure is climbing now, coming up the stairs towards you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|1: Footsteps rise: the figure below is ascending, not descending.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|2: The one on the stairs has turned around and is coming up.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|0: The figure on the stairs is much closer than before, just a flight down.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|1: The descending figure has closed the distance; it's nearly on your landing.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|2: Whoever is below is only a few steps down now.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|0: The figure below has stopped. It is looking up at you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|1: Down the shaft, the figure stands still, face turned up towards you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|2: The one on the stairs isn't descending now. It's watching you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|0: The stairwell below is empty. Whoever was descending is gone.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|1: There is no figure on the stairs this time.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|2: The one ahead of you has vanished from the shaft.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|0: The figure below looks up and lifts a hand, as if it has been waiting for you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|1: The figure mouths something up the shaft. It might be 'again.'
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|2: It beckons you down, slow and certain, as though it knows you.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|0: A caged bulb throws steady light across the landing.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|1: The stairwell light burns evenly overhead, as always.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|2: The fluorescent strip on the landing glows its usual flat white.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|3: Light falls here the same as every landing above.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|0: This landing is dimmer than the ones above it.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|1: The light here has half given up; the corners stay dark.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|2: A grey murk hangs over the landing.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0: The caged bulb stutters, then steadies.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1: The stairwell light flickers in a way it hasn't before.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2: Overhead, the light trips once and comes back.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|0: The landing is lit red, an emergency bulb you don't remember.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|1: Everything wears a low red emergency glow.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|2: The white light is gone; only a red bulb remains.
a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|0: A taped notice on the lift reads OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS.
a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|1: The repair notice is still there: lift out of order.
a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|2: OUT OF ORDER, says the sign taped across the lift doors.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|0: The arrow on the notice points up, not down.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|1: The sign's arrow has flipped to point back up the stairs.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|2: The notice directs you upward now.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|0: The lift notice is gone. Just bare metal doors.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|1: No sign on the lift this time.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|2: The repair notice has been taken down.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|0: The notice now reads LIFT IN SERVICE.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|1: The sign says the lift is working again.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|2: OUT OF ORDER has become BACK IN SERVICE.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|0: The notice reads DO NOT USE STAIRS.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|1: The sign warns STAIRS CLOSED, it never did before.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|2: The notice now tells you not to take the stairs at all.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|0: A large painted 8 marks the landing wall.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|1: The floor number, 8, is stencilled on the concrete.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|2: '8' is painted on the wall, drips frozen beneath the strokes.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|3: The wall reads 8, the same as the landing before.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|0: The wall reads B. Basement. You are nowhere near it.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|1: The number is gone; a painted 'B' stands in its place.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|2: The stencil reads B, though you've barely started down.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|0: The painted number has faded to a grey ghost.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|1: Someone has scrubbed the number half away.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|2: The 8 on the wall is almost gone.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:reversed|0: The 8 is painted backwards, as if seen in a mirror.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:reversed|2: The stencilled number reads the wrong way round.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|0: The wall reads 7. It has always read 8.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|1: The painted number is a 6 now, not an 8.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|2: The floor number has changed: it says 9.
a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|0: The steel handrail runs cold and unbroken under your hand.
a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|1: The painted railing is right where it always is.
a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|2: Your hand finds the handrail, continuous along the flight.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|0: A section of the handrail is missing over the drop.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|1: The railing has a gap where a length has been removed.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|2: Part of the handrail simply isn't there.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|0: The railing is a different colour from the flights above.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|1: Someone has repainted this stretch of handrail.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|2: The rail's paint is green here, not grey.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|0: The handrail is wet, though nothing drips on it.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|1: Your hand comes away damp from the rail.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|2: The railing is slick under your palm.
a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|0: The shaft feels exactly as deep as it always has.
a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|1: You carry the same wariness down flight after flight.
a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|2: Everything feels ordinary, as far as any of this is ordinary.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|0: The shaft feels deeper than it should, the ground floor further off.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|1: You feel you've descended far more than eight floors.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|2: The bottom seems to have moved further away.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|0: For a moment you can't remember how many landings you've passed.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|1: You lose count of the flights above you, and it frightens you.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|2: You can't recall which floor you started on.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|0: For an instant you're certain you've been climbing, not descending.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|1: A wrong feeling grips you: that down has been up all along.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|2: You feel, briefly and coldly, that you are going the wrong way.
a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|0: Your footsteps echo up the shaft and fade.
a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|1: The stairwell is quiet but for your own steps.
a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|2: Far below, the building hums to itself.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:drip|0: Water drips somewhere down the shaft. Tick. Tick.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:drip|1: A slow drip echoes up from below.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|0: Footsteps climb towards you, then stop.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|1: You hear steps that aren't yours on the flight below.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|2: For a moment, someone else is on the stairs.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|0: The building's hum has stopped. Dead quiet.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|1: It is completely silent. Too silent.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|2: Even the echo of your steps seems to vanish.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|0: A door slams far below, then silence.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|1: Somewhere beneath you a door bangs shut.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|2: A heavy door closes several floors down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|0: The flight down is clear, its steps even and dry.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|1: The stairs descend as always, nothing on them.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|2: The next flight drops away, clean and empty.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|0: Something has been left on the steps below, a bag, maybe.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|1: There's debris scattered across the next flight.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|2: A dark shape sits partway down the flight.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|0: One of the steps in the flight below is missing.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|1: There's a gap in the stairs where a step should be.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|2: A tread is gone from the flight down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|0: The arrow stencilled on the steps points UP, not down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|1: The direction painted on the stairs has reversed.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|2: The steps seem to lead up now, though you are going down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|0: The steps below shine wet in the light.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|1: The next flight is slick with water.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|2: The stairs down are wet, though you saw no spill.
a:stairway8|tagline: The lift is out. Eight floors down, one landing at a time.
